title: Identify Key Elements to Build
acceptance_criteria: Complete list of components to build from scratch
Complete list of components to reuse from nanobot
Complete list of components to research/adapt
description: Create final deliverable clearly identifying: (1) KEY ELEMENTS TO BUILD - new components we must create from scratch with detailed descriptions of what they do, (2) KEY ELEMENTS TO REUSE - existing nanobot components we will use as-is, (3) KEY ELEMENTS TO EXTEND - nanobot components we need to modify or enhance, (4) KEY ELEMENTS TO INTEGRATE - third-party components we will integrate, (5) Priority ranking - which components to build first based on dependencies and value, (6) Technology choices - justification for each technology selection with trade-off analysis (e.g., why Monaco vs code-server, why FastAPI vs alternatives). This will be the master build plan.
